passive.name: Dirty Fighting
passive.description:
Every three hits from Akshan's Attacks and Abilities deals bonus damage and grants him a Shield if the target was a champion.

When Akshan Attacks, he fires an additional Attack for reduced damage. If he cancels the additional Attack, he instead gains Move Speed.

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} Whenever '''Akshan''' uses a [[basic attack]], he fires an additional shot after a delay that deals {{as|50% AD}} {{as|physical damage}}, increased to {{as|100% AD}} against {{tip|minions}}. If this shot is cancelled, he gains {{as|{{pp|20 to 75}}|ms}} {{times}} {{as|(1 + 100% '''bonus''' attack speed)}} {{as|{{sti|'''bonus''' movement speed}}|ms}} decaying over 1 second.
wiki_detail.description2: The additional shot applies {{tip|on-hit}} and {{tip|on-attack}} effects at 100% effectiveness and can {{tip|critically strike}} for{{ft|{{as|{{critical damage|175|100|mod=0.7}} physical damage}}.|70% '''total''' {{sti|{{as|critical damage}}}}.}}
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Akshan's''' basic attacks {{tip|on-hit}} and [[champion ability|ability]] hits apply a [[stack]] of ''Dirty Fighting'' to enemies for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and stacking up to 3 times. The third stack against a target consumes them all to deal them {{as|{{pp|15;40;80;150|1;6;11;16}}|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}; if the target is a {{tip|champion}}, '''Akshan''' will also gain a {{pp|40+(240/17)*(x-1)*(0.7025+0.0175*(x-1))}} {{as|(+ 35% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{tip|shield}} for 2 seconds. The shield may be gained only once every few seconds.
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|{{ccd|Akshan|missile_speed}}|Missile speed of basic attacks and crits}} / {{tt|5000|Additional shot missile speed}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Applies {{tip|basic damage}} for the second shot and {{tip|proc damage}} for the bonus damage.
* The second shot:
** Cannot apply {{iis|Yun Tal Wildarrows}} {{nie|Serrated Edge}} {{bug|1}}
** Is treated as a basic attack.
** Critically strikes independently from the first shot.
** Can be cancelled by inputting a different command right after using the first shot.
** Counts as a separate hit for effects such as {{ri|Electrocute}}, {{iis|Muramana}} {{nie|Shock}}, and {{iis|Eclipse}} {{nie|Ever Rising Moon}}.
** Starts the attack windup's cooldown after it is used, rather than when the first shot is.
* The attack speed scaling on the movement speed buff includes the bonus attack speed gained from '''Akshan's''' innate attack speed growth.
** At level 18, at minimum it grants {{fd|{{#expr: 75 * (1 + 17*{{ccd|Akshan|as_lvl}}*0.01)}}}} decaying movement speed.
* You can redirect the second shot to aim at a different target
* If a target dies by the first shot, your second shot will prefer minions which it kills (Similar to Lucians second shot)
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Akshan}} basic attack causes him to fire a second attack that deals {{as|'''reduced''' physical damage}}. If '''Akshan''' cancels the second attack, he gains a brief burst of {{as|{{sti|move speed}}|ms}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Akshan's''' attacks and abilities apply a stack to enemies hit. The third stack consumes them all to deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}; if the target was a {{tip|champion}}, he also gains a brief {{tip|shield}}.

Q.name: Avengerang
Q.description: Akshan throws a boomerang that deals damage going out and coming back, extending its range each time it hits an enemy.
Q.tooltip:
Akshan throws a boomerang that deals {{ finaldamage }} physical damage, extending the range each time an enemy is hit.

Champion hits grant Akshan {{ totalhaste }} Move Speed decaying over {{ hasteduration }} second.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Akshan''' throws a boomerang in the target direction that briefly grants {{tip|sight}} around its trajectory and deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit, {{tip|standard sight|revealing}} them for 1 second and extending its range each time it hits a target. If this hits an enemy {{tip|champion}}, '''Akshan''' gains {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} that decays over 1 second.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|5 to 85}} {{as|(+ 80% AD)}}}}
{{st|Bonus Movement Speed|20% {{as|(+ 5% per 100 AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: Once the boomerang has passed its original range and has not hit a target in the last 500 units of travelling, it homes back to '''Akshan''' and applies the same effects to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Enemies can be hit only once per pass.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Avengerang'' will fire from wherever '''Akshan''' is at the end of the cast time.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will only block a single hit. They do not prevent the initial throw from extending its range.
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Akshan}} throws a boomerang that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit, extending the boomerang range and briefly {{tip|standard sight|revealing}} them. If this hits an enemy {{tip|champion}}, '''Akshan''' gains a brief burst of {{sti|ms|{{as|move speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Once the boomerang has passed its original range and has not recently hit an enemy, it homes back to '''Akshan''' and deals the same effects to enemies hit.

W.name: Going Rogue
W.description:
Akshan passively marks enemy champions as Scoundrels when they kill his ally champions. If Akshan kills a Scoundrel, he resurrects the allies they killed, gains bonus gold, and clears all marks.

When activated, Akshan enters camouflage and gains Move Speed and Mana Regen while moving towards Scoundrels. Akshan loses the camouflage quickly while he is not in brush or near terrain.

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Akshan''' marks enemy {{tip|champions}} that kill allied champions as ''Scoundrels'' for 60 seconds. If '''Akshan''' scores a {{tip|takedown}} against a ''Scoundrel'' while alive and within 3 seconds of damaging them, he receives an additional {{g|100}} and revives all {{tip|death|dead}} allied champions that they have slain after 1 second.
wiki_detail.description2: When '''Akshan''' claims a ''Scoundrel's'' bounty he removes the marks of all other enemies. ''Scoundrels'' refresh their mark duration on subsequent kills, and will have their mark removed when they die by any means. '''Akshan''' cannot mark enemies as ''Scoundrels'' while they are dead. Allies are revived at their [[Spawn|summoning platform]].
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Akshan''' enters {{tip|camouflage}}, which lasts indefinitely while he is near [[terrain]] or inside {{tip|brush}}, and for 2 seconds otherwise. During this time. he can see trails leading toward ''Scoundrels'', and while facing them if they are within {{tt|5000|Pending for test}} units, he gains {{as|{{sti|'''bonus''' mana regeneration}}|mana}} equal to {{as|12% of his '''missing''' mana}} as well as {{as|{{sti|'''bonus''' movement speed}}|ms}}.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Going Rogue'' can be recast after 1 second, and does so automatically after its duration. Attacking or casting abilities ends ''Going Rogue'' immediately.
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Akshan''' can move during ''Going Rogue's'' cast time.
* The mark displays the duration and slay count.
** Enemy champions that kill '''Akshan''' will not be marked as ''Scoundrels'' nor increase their slay count.
* {{tip|Clone|Clones}} do not count for triggering ''Going Rogue's'' passive.
* ''Going Rogue's'' buff refreshes to last indefinitely upon moving near terrain or into brush, and will refresh to 2 seconds after leaving near terrain or brush.
* Allied champions within a {{tip|zombie state}} are revived only after the state ends.
* '''Akshan''' can still trigger ''Going Rogue's'' passive while he is within a {{tip|zombie state}}.
* Using a basic attack breaks the stealth at the start of the attack windup.
wiki_detail.flavorsound:
{{sm2|Akshan_Original_W_2.ogg}} ''"To the shadows... where the scoundrels hide."''
{{sm2|Akshan Original W SFX ally revived.ogg}} ''Ally revived alert.''
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} Enemy {{tip|champions}} that kill allied champions are marked as a ''Scoundrel'' for a long time. When {{ci|Akshan}} scores a {{tip|takedown}} on a ''Scoundrel'', he gains {{g|'''bonus''' gold}}, all allies killed by the ''Scoundrel'' are revived, and ''Scoundrel'' status is removed from all other enemies.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Akshan''' briefly gains {{tip|camouflage}}, or indefinitely while near [[terrain]] and in {{tip|brush}}. During this time, he can see trails leading toward ''Scoundrels'' and gains {{as|{{sti|move speed}}|ms}} and {{as|{{sti|mana regeneration}}|mana}} while moving toward them.

E.name: Heroic Swing
E.description: Akshan fires a grappling hook into terrain then swings around it, repeatedly firing at the nearest enemy while swinging. He can jump off early or gets knocked off when colliding with champions or terrain.
E.tooltip:
First Cast: Akshan fires a grappling hook, attaching to the first terrain hit.

Second Cast: Akshan swings around the terrain, repeatedly firing at the nearest enemy for {{ damagetodeal }} physical damage per shot.

Third Cast: Akshan dives off the rope, firing a final shot.

Colliding with an enemy Champion or terrain ends the swing early.

Champion takedowns refresh this Ability's Cooldown.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Akshan''' can activate ''Heroic Swing'' three times before the ability goes on cooldown, and can use the third cast only after {{fd|0.5}} seconds of the second cast. '''Akshan''' may input an attack or movement command to use the second and third casts.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|First Cast:}} '''Akshan''' fires a hook in the target direction that embeds in the first [[terrain]] hit, and enters {{tt|preparation|See notes}} for up to {{fd|2.125}} seconds. ''Heroic Swing's'' second cast can be used while the hook is attached. If the hook fails to attach or '''Akshan''' is {{tt|moved|See notes}} or becomes {{tip|immobilize|immobilized}}, {{tip|ground|grounded}}, or {{tip|polymorph|polymorphed}} within the duration, the preparation will end prematurely, cancelling ''Heroic Swing'' in the process.
wiki_detail.description3:
{{sbc|Second Cast:}} '''Akshan''' {{tip|dash|swings}} around the terrain in either a clockwise or counterclockwise direction based on the position of the cursor relative to his {{tt|facing direction|See notes}}, stopping upon colliding with an enemy champion or terrain. While swinging, he fires at the nearest {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy every {{rutngt|0.2}} to deal them {{as|physical damage}} and apply {{tip|on-hit}} effects at 25% effectiveness per shot.

'''''Akshan''' will be {{tip|knockdown|knocked down}} by any {{tip|immobilize|immobilizing}} or {{tip|polymorph|polymorphing}} crowd control during the dash.''
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Physical Damage per Shot|{{ap|15 to 75}} {{as|(+ 15% AD)}} {{times}} {{as|(1 + {{fd|0.3}} per 100% '''bonus''' attack speed)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: {{sbc|Third Cast:}} '''Akshan''' ends the swing by {{tip|dash|jumping}} to the target location, though not through terrain, and fires one last shot at a nearby {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy.
wiki_detail.description5: Scoring an enemy champion {{tip|takedown}} reduces ''Heroic Swing's'' {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} to {{fd|0.5}} seconds. The shots can {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} for{{ft|{{as|{{critical damage|175|100|mod=0.9}} physical damage}}|90% '''total''' {{sti|{{as|critical damage}}}}}}and {{tip|applies life steal|apply}} {{stil|life steal}} at 100% effectiveness.
wiki_detail.description6: ''{{ai|Avengerang|Akshan}} and {{ai|Going Rogue|Akshan}} can be cast during the third cast's dash. {{ai|Comeuppance|Akshan}} can be cast at all points during Heroic Swing, though '''Akshan''' cannot fire during the swing while it is active. '''Akshan''' prioritizes firing at enemy champions with stacks of {{ai|Dirty Fighting|Akshan}}, then those damaged by his [[unit-targeted|targeted]] spells in the last 4 seconds, then the nearest enemy. Heroic Swing can be cast during '''Akshan's''' other abilities.''
wiki_detail.target range: |speed        = {{tt|2500|Hook missile speed}} / {{tt|1200|Dash orbital speed}} / {{tt|3000|Automatic attacks missile speed}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The second cast's dash will displace '''Akshan''' around the terrain in either a clockwise or counterclockwise direction, with the specific direction being determined by the position of the player's cursor relative to his facing direction.
** The dash will move clockwise if the player's cursor is anywhere to the left of '''Akshan''' from his facing direction (or perspective), and counterclockwise if the cursor is anywhere to his right.
* '''Akshan''' will not stop swinging until his dash is stopped.
** The swing will end prematurely if the terrain the hook was attached to no longer exists, such as [[Terrain#Player-Generated|player-generated terrain]].
* '''Akshan''' will prioritize firing at enemies he damaged with ''any'' unit-targeted ability or spell within the last 4 seconds, such as {{ai|R|Akshan}} or {{si|Ignite}}.
* ''Heroic Swing'' grants a buff to '''Akshan''' for 2 seconds that indicates and determines the first cast's duration.
** This buff starts as soon as the ability is cast, and lingers for {{fd|0.125}} seconds after it expires.
*** This means the hook can be attached to terrain for longer if it hits it earlier in the duration, and vice versa.
** If '''Akshan''' {{tip|dash|dashes}} (excluding second cast's dash) or {{tip|blink|blinks}} or becomes affected by {{tip|immobilize|immobilization}}, {{tip|ground}}, or {{tip|polymorph}} in the duration, the buff is removed ''immediately'', causing the first cast to be lost and cancelling ''Heroic Swing'' entirely.
* '''Akshan''' immediately fires one shot at the beginning of his swing and a final shot while dismounting from the swing.
* '''Akshan''' can fire at any targetable enemy unit excluding [[structure]]s and [[jungle plants]].
* Only ''Heroic Swing's'' first cast is disabled while {{tip|ground|grounded}} or {{tip|root|rooted}}. The third cast is still usable during those effects.
* ''Heroic Swing's'' second and third cast can both be used while {{tip|silence|silenced}}.
* {{tip|Takedown|Takedowns}} against {{tip|clone|clones}} do not count for resetting ''Heroic Swing's'' cooldown.
* If a {{tip|takedown}} is scored while ''Heroic Swing'' is active, the cooldown afterwards will be {{fd|0.5}} seconds.
* '''Akshan''' will attempt to basic attack the target he fired at with the last shot after the third cast's dash ends, if there is no other input given.
* Each shot generates a stack of {{ri|Conqueror}}.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will only block a single shot.
* The attack speed scaling on the damage of the attacks includes the bonus attack speed gained from '''Akshan's''' innate attack speed growth.
** At level 18, each shot at minimum deals {{fd|{{#expr: 90 * (1 + 0.3*17*{{ccd|Akshan|as_lvl}}*0.01)}}}} {{as|(+ {{fd|{{#expr:15 * (1 + 0.3*17*{{ccd|Akshan|as_lvl}}*0.01)}}}}% AD)}} physical damage.
* Despite this ability not applying {{tip|on-attack}} effects, it does apply {{iis|Navori Flickerblade}} {{nie|Transcendence}}.{{bug|1}}
* Under certain circumstances, upon attaching the hook to terrain, '''Akshan''' will create a particle on the location permanently.{{bug|1}}
** This particle can be attacked by minions.
* {{pending for test}} Hook range including lollipop against walls, automated attacks range while swinging, final dash distance and speed.
* The following table refers for interactions while the hook is attached or in flight:
{{ct|attack=Automatically initiates the second cast.|move=Automatically initiates the second cast.|cast={{ai|Avengerang|Akshan}} and {{ai|Going Rogue|Akshan}} are disabled. {{ai|Comeuppance|Akshan}} is usable.|items=false|consume=false|spells=false,interrupts,false,false,false|interrupts=death,root,ground}}
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Akshan''' is swinging:
{{ct|attack=Automatically initiates the third cast.|move=Automatically initiates the third cast.|cast={{ai|Avengerang|Akshan}} and {{ai|Going Rogue|Akshan}} are disabled. {{ai|Comeuppance|Akshan}} is usable.|items=true,true,interrupts,interrupts,true,interrupts,true|consume=true|spells=true,interrupts,false,false,true|interrupts=death,root}}
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|First Cast:}} {{ci|Akshan}} prepares to swing by firing a hook that embeds in the first [[terrain]] hit. ''Heroic Swing's'' second cast can be used while the hook is attached.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Second Cast:}} '''Akshan''' {{tip|dash|swings}} around the terrain in a direction, firing {{as|physical damage}} bullets at the nearest enemy. He may swing indefinitely, or until he collides with an enemy champion or terrain.
wiki_detail.blurb3:
{{sbc|Third Cast:}} While swinging, he can recast again to {{tip|dash|jump}} toward the target location and fire a final shot.
''Heroic Swing's'' {{sti|cooldown}} will reset upon scoring a champion {{tip|takedown}}.

R.name: Comeuppance
R.description: Akshan locks onto an enemy champion and starts storing bullets. When released, he fires all stored bullets, dealing damage based on missing health to the first champion, minion, or structure hit.
R.tooltip:
Akshan locks onto a champion and begins overcharging his gun for up to {{ channelduration }} seconds, storing up to {{ numberofbullets }} bullets.

Recast: Akshan unleashes the stored bullets, each dealing at least {{ damageperbulletwithcrit }} physical damage to the first enemy or structure hit, increased up to {{ maxdamageperbullet }} physical damage based on missing Health.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Akshan''' locks onto the target enemy champion and begins {{tip|channel|channeling}} for {{fd|2.5}} seconds, {{tip|true sight|revealing}} them as well as {{tip|sight|revealing}} himself. He gradually stores bullets into his weapon over the duration.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Comeuppance'' will recast after the duration, or can recast early after {{fd|0.5}} seconds. ''Comeuppance'' is placed on a {{sti|cd|5-second}} cooldown if the channel is cancelled.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Akshan''' fires all stored bullets at the target, each briefly granting {{tip|sight}} around their trajectory and dealing {{as|physical damage}} to the first enemy hit, increased by {{as|{{pp|key=%|key1=%|type=target's '''missing''' health|0 to 200 for 11|0 to 100|formula=2% per 1% of target's '''missing''' health, capped at 100% '''missing''' health}}|health}}. The shots can hit [[structures]].
wiki_detail.leveling3:
{{#vardefine:critScaling|
{{times}} {{as|(1 + {{critical damage|0.5|flat=true}} per 100% critical strike chance)|critical chance}}}}{{st|Minimum Physical Damage per Bullet|{{ap|25 to 45}} {{as|(+ 15% AD)}}{{#var:critScaling}}|Maximum Physical Damage per Bullet|{{ap|25*3 to 45*3}} {{as|(+ {{ap|15*3}}% AD)}}{{#var:critScaling}}|Minimum Charged Physical Damage|{{ap|5*25|6*35|7*45}} {{as|(+ {{ap|15*5 to 15*7}}% AD)}}{{#var:critScaling}}|Damage to target with 67% missing hp|{{ap|3*5*25|3*6*35|3*7*45}} {{as|(+ {{ap|3*5*15 to 3*7*15}}% AD)}}{{#var:critScaling}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: Each bullet's damage <!--is also increased by {{fd|0.5}}% per {{sti|{{as|1% critical strike chance}}}} and {{sti|{{as|critical damage}}}} bonuses at 50% effectiveness,-->{{tip|applies life steal|applies}} {{stil|life steal}} at 100% effectiveness, and {{tip|execute|executes}} {{tip|minions}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Comeuppance'' refreshes the duration of ''{{ai|Dirty Fighting|Akshan}}'' stacks on the target every {{fd|0.25}} seconds.
* A kill threshold will appear on the [[health bar]] of the target locked onto during the channel, which increases each time '''Akshan''' stores a bullet. If the target's {{as|'''current''' health}} falls below the threshold, their health bar will be framed in red.
** The indicator factors the bonus damage applied by {{ai|Dirty Fighting|Akshan}} as well as [[damage modifier|damage modifiers]] and the target's resistances.
** It also factors the projected increase in the target's {{as|'''missing''' health}}, from which each consecutive bullet scales more.
** It updates dynamically over the channel's duration, reacting to fluctuations of the target's health and damage mitigations.
* The {{tip|true sight|reveal}} will linger for 2 seconds after the channel has ended.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will not prevent the lock-on and will only block a single bullet.
* ''Comeuppance'' will not go on a reduced cooldown if '''Akshan''' {{tip|death|dies}} during the channel.
* ''Comeuppance'' will cancel if the target becomes {{tip|untargetable}} or {{tip|death|dies}} during the channel.
* Damage to structures '''does''' scale with their {{as|'''missing''' health}}.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Akshan''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|move=true|cast={{ai|Q|Akshan}} and {{ai|W|Akshan}} are disabled. {{ai|E|Akshan}} is usable.|attack=false|items=false|consume=false|spells=true,true,false,false,interrupts|interrupts=death,silence}}
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Akshan}} locks onto the target enemy champion and begins {{tip|channel|channeling}} power into his gun to store bullets, {{tip|true sight|revealing}} them as well as {{tip|sight|revealing}} himself. ''Comeuppance'' will recast after the channel, or can recast early.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Recast:}} Akshan fires the stored bullets at the target, each dealing {{as|physical damage}} to the first enemy hit, increased by {{as|their '''missing''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: '''Akshan''' can move normally and cast ''{{ai|Heroic Swing|Akshan}}'' while channeling and firing ''Comeuppance''.
_comments: is also increased by {{fd|0.5}}% per {{sti|{{as|1% critical strike chance}}}} and {{sti|{{as|critical damage}}}} bonuses at 50% effectiveness,
